title: Triggers new row
poc: create table t1 (id int, name varchar(1024));

update on t1 referencing new row as new_row
         for each row insert into t1 values(0, 'update_new_row');
key_bug_features: update on t1 referencing new row as new_row
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(1024), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TRIGGER update_new_row AFTER UPDATE ON t1 FOR EACH ROW INSERT INTO t1 (id, name) VALUES (0, 'update_new_row');
UPDATE t1 SET name = 'updated_monet' WHERE id = 20;
